title: Goat Damage Sound
description: Change the player's damage sound to a very annoying goat's scream! 🐐
body:
Change the player's **damage** sound to a very annoying **goat's** scream! Remembering that the texture is **compatible** with almost **all** versions of the game, 1.8x up to 1.20x quietly. 🐐

<iframe width="1857" height="788" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/bVLWdBxfdco" title="Trailer Goat Damage Sound (resource pack by t2rtle). 🐐" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
                                                          
**CREDITS**: @t2rtle (**creator** and **owner**) 👑
